meaning.superseded_prior_meaning: 20% improvement was only the contest floor and not enough for SOTA.

control_effect.reason_ordinary_amendment_not_supported: The current amendment_orchestrator only applies anchor-preserving patches and authority expansion; it rejects semantic_base_change and required_outcomes_changed as requiring requirements reapproval.

not_allowed_without_recompile: do not claim goal_achieved under the old requirements hash chain
do not treat 20% as SOTA while requirements.control.json still states stricter thresholds
do not start S10 without a verifier-permitted current runtime chain
